successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest, CreateLeaveRequestDto, and UpdateLeaveRequestStatusDto interfaces
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface and PgLeaveRequestRepository class
PgLeaveRequestRepository implements all repository methods using PostgreSQL pool with proper error handling
All repository methods use the exact SQL schema provided with correct column names and types
Repository tests in src/modules/leave/leave.repository.test.ts pass with Vitest
src/modules/leave/index.ts exports the repository and types

constraints: GP-001: All database operations use repository pattern
GP-006: Error handling - No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Repository pattern must be used for all database access
PostgreSQL must be used as the database backend
TypeScript interfaces must match the provided SQL schema
All repository methods must be implemented with proper error handling
outOfScope: Leave request creation service with validation (Phase 2)
Leave request approval workflow with RBAC (Phase 3)
Business logic beyond basic CRUD operations
Any changes to employee, policy, balance, or notification modules

ambiguities.description: The architecture-agent specifies LeaveType and LeaveStatus imports from src/shared/types/index.ts, but the provided interfaces use string literals instead of imported types
options: Use the imported LeaveType and LeaveStatus types from shared/types
Keep string literals as shown in the provided interfaces

ambiguities.description: The SQL schema uses DATE for start_date and end_date, but TypeScript interfaces use Date objects which include time
options: Change TypeScript interfaces to use string or Date for dates
Keep as Date but handle date-only conversion in repository
